'''âr-ch-zh-r''' ('''karachzheroko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:unbeget|unbeget]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-ch-zh-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:unbeget|unbeget]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âr-ch-zh-r
|-
! Lemma
| karachzheroko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thirachzheroko|thirachzheroko]] || [[word:jirachzheroko|jirachzheroko]] || [[word:shirachzheroko|shirachzheroko]] || [[word:kirachzheroko|kirachzheroko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthurachzheroko|thuthurachzheroko]] || [[word:jujurachzheroko|jujurachzheroko]] || [[word:shushurachzheroko|shushurachzheroko]] || [[word:kukurachzheroko|kukurachzheroko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
